headline: Mbappé praises Olise's playmaking ability
body: Kylian Mbappé expressed his enjoyment of playing with Michael Olise, highlighting Olise's vision and ability to find his teammates.
text:
👀 Kylian Mbappé: “It’s so easy to play with Michael Olise. He makes it easier, playing with his heads up…

…he can always see my movements. I love playing with Michael”.
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report RUMOUR | Mbappé praises Olise's playmaking ability
